ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "org_description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  "org_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., department, agency) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the organization */,
  "org_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organization */,
  "org_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "org_website" TEXT /* Official website URL */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the organization was established */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget of the organization */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* Total number of employees in the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of ages in the group (e.g., 16-19, 20-24) */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment status (e.g., In post, On leave) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment status */,
  "status_code" TEXT /* Short code for the employment status */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the status is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment data record */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employment status */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization */,
  "headcount" INTEGER /* Total headcount of employees */,
  "fte" INTEGER /* Full-time equivalent (FTE) employees */,
  "mean_salary" REAL /* Mean salary of employees */,
  "median_salary" REAL /* Median salary of employees */,
  "min_salary" REAL /* Minimum salary of employees */,
  "max_salary" REAL /* Maximum salary of employees */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of employees by gender (e.g., 50% Male, 50% Female) */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of employees by ethnicity */,
  "highest_degree" TEXT /* Highest degree held by employees */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the record was added */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date the record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES employment_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry clerk, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for user authentication */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., data entry clerk, analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is the default role for new users */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is the default permission for new roles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, data entry, data edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or client */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the action was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary trend record */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "mean_salary" REAL /* Mean salary of employees */,
  "median_salary" REAL /* Median salary of employees */,
  "min_salary" REAL /* Minimum salary of employees */,
  "max_salary" REAL /* Maximum salary of employees */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of employees by gender (e.g., 50% Male, 50% Female) */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of employees by ethnicity */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the trend record was added */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date the trend record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_trends_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_trends_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field to validate */,
  "rule" TEXT /* Validation rule (e.g., required, numeric, date range) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the validation rule is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the validation rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the validation rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log entry */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employment data record */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field with the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the error */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address where the error occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client or browser where the error occurred */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the error has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES employment_data ("record_id")
)
